creator: tobias.rehbein@web.de
text:
Am Mon, Nov 26, 2012 at 08:17:22AM +0000 schrieb Edwin Groothuis:
> Please note that PR ports/173726 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

As discussed in this thread[1], the proposed solution is merely a
workaround but a solution. Good news is that a nice solution has been
proposed on the list.

[1]:
http://www.mail-archive.com/freebsd-ports@freebsd.org/msg45540.html
